options.description:
Maximum number of tokens (words) allowed in the
bot's responses.

options.name: --memory-length
options.description:
The total number of user and agent messages to keep in
memory and send with new prompt.

options.name: --no-banner
options.description:
Do not display the startup banner or the copyright
message.

options.name: --presence-penalty
options.description:
Discourages reusing phrases already present in the
conversation.

options.description:
System prompt to initialize the bot's starting
context.

options.name: --temperature
options.description:
Controls randomness: higher values generate more
creative responses.

options.name: --topP
options.description:
TopP controls diversity by limiting the token pool for
bot responses.

options.name: --verbosity
options.description:
Sets the output verbosity level. Allowed values are
(q)uiet, (m)inimal, (n)ormal, (de)tailed and (di)agnostic.
